title: TFC Terra Incognita
description: TFC Terra Incognita is based on the challenging survival of TerraFirmaCraft combined with the mythical Create mod, a lot of new immersive mechanics, visuals and sounds, featuring addons that perfectly fit the TFC thematic.
body:
⚙️ TFC Terra Incognita:
Redefines the survival loop by the harder realism of TerraFirmaCraft combined with the kinetic engineering of Create. Solve the logisticals in a world where gravity, nutrition, and metal purity actually matter and affects the gameplay, weather in terra incognita could be very tricky and deathly.

🛠️ Mechanical Integration:
Primitive Kinetic Power: Say goodbye to simple water wheels. In the early stages, you'll rely on TFC-style manual labor and basic mechanical power to drive your first Crushers and Mechanical Presses, essential for processing high-grade ores and shaping plates.

🛠️ The Metallurgy Bridge:
Create’s automation is locked behind TFC’s metallurgy. You won't reach the "Brass Age" without first mastering the Bloomery and the Blast Furnace. Specialized alloys are required to craft high-stress kinetic components.

🛠️ Logistics & Weight: 
With TFC's inventory weight limits, Belts, Chutes, and Trains become mandatory. Designing efficient transport systems is the only way to move massive amounts of ore from distant veins back to your central forge.

🛠️ Thermal & Fluid Management: 
Manage molten metals using Create’s fluid pipes and tanks. Automate your Casting Tables and Basins to streamline tool production and large-scale block casting.

Villager Recruits: 
An exciting Minecraft modification that allows you to hire and command your own army of villagers. Enhance your gameplay with strategic faction battles, claim and siege mechanics and intelligent NPC features.

Deep Immersion & Sensory Feedback:
Sound Physics Remastered: High-fidelity reverb and occlusion in TFC's deep, sprawling caverns.

Presence Footsteps & Ambient Sounds: Enhanced environmental audio that reacts to the specific terrain and weather conditions of the TFC biomes.

Multiplayer Coordination: Integrated Simple Voice Chat allows for real-time coordination in the game.

Realistic Weather system with Weather2 mod integration, look out for heavy storms and tornadoes!

🧪 Technical Specifications:
Core Overhaul: Full TFC-based world generation with realistic mineral strata.
Kinetic Hardcore: Adjusted stress capacities and recipes to match TFC’s material progression.
Performance Optimized: Includes optimization mods like Embeddium, memory fix and more, to ensure smooth gameplay even with complex rotational machinery and a lot of entities, it's has shaders support.

TFC Terra Incognita is a medium-content-modpack, you need to allocated more ram before launching the game:

Minimum RAM: 6 GB (6144MB).

Recommended RAM: 8 GB (8192 MB) for optimal performance.

Add this mem settings in the modrinth app > instance settings > configuration > java and memory > custom memory selection.

Here the Terrafirmacraft+ wiki:

https://terrafirmacraft.github.io/Field-Guide/20/en_us/
